meaning: n.[生化]卵黄磷蛋白,蛋黄素
examples: Ovary may be the synthetic position of vitellin.
Female specific proteins, containing vitellin (Vn) and vitellogenin (Vg), are main nutrition resource in early stage of life for oviparous animals.
So, studying the effect on behavior and synthesization of vitellin of diamondback moth are essential for understanding the regulation function of polyamines on the physiological process of insect.
